prompt: Recommend initial layout and CONVENTIONS.md for a new Hono + Drizzle + Postgres TypeScript API that will be maintained mostly by Claude Code and Cursor.

assertions.text: layout.txt organizes by feature (auth/, billing/, users/) rather than primarily by horizontal layer
layout.txt colocates test files next to source files rather than in a distant tests/ tree
layout.txt contains concrete domain directories like auth, billing, or users
CONVENTIONS.md explicitly addresses naming — avoiding generic names or requiring domain-specific names
CONVENTIONS.md gives a concrete file-size guideline with a number
CONVENTIONS.md requires type annotations on public / module-boundary functions
CONVENTIONS.md mentions tests/lint/typecheck as the verification loop
CONVENTIONS.md discourages dynamic/metaprogramming patterns for agent-traceability
CONVENTIONS.md explains at least one decision in terms of AI-agent behavior
CONVENTIONS.md recommends branded / nominal types for IDs (e.g. UserId as branded string) — v1.3 guidance
CONVENTIONS.md prefers discriminated unions (or equivalent) over magic-string dispatch / string-keyed registries — v1.3 guidance
CONVENTIONS.md addresses dependency pinning, version pinning, or 'boring stack' / training-data hygiene — v1.3 guidance
CONVENTIONS.md covers deterministic tests (seeded randomness, frozen time) OR injectable side effects (clock, fetch, env as arguments) — v1.3 guidance
CONVENTIONS.md explicitly discourages barrel / re-export index files — v1.3 guidance (AR011)
